name: Fava Bean Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the oats, bran, wheat germ, and dry potato flakes.
2. Add the V-8 juice to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Beat the egg in a separate bowl.
4. Add the drained Fava beans to the oat mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
5. Mix in the shredded carrots, finely chopped onion, and chopped green pepper.
6. Form the mixture into patties of desired size.
7. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
8. Cook the patties for 12-15 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crispy.
9. Turn off the heat and serve the fava bean burgers hot from the pan.
